words.example_sentence: Sliding window maintains a range over data.
words.code_snippet:
def max_sum(arr, k):
    window = sum(arr[:k])
    max_val = window
    for i in range(k, len(arr)):
        window += arr[i] - arr[i-k]
        max_val = max(max_val, window)
    return max_val
words.example_sentence_cn: 滑动窗口在数据上维护一个范围。

words.example_sentence_cn: 稳定排序保持相等元素的相对顺序。

words.example_sentence: A recursive function calls itself.
words.example_sentence_cn: 递归函数调用自身。

words.example_sentence: The base case prevents infinite recursion.
words.example_sentence_cn: 基本情况停止递归。

words.example_sentence: Swap two elements in an array.
words.code_snippet:
a, b = 1, 2
a, b = b, a
print(a, b)
words.example_sentence_cn: 交换数组中的两个元素。

words.example_sentence: Partition divides array around a pivot.
words.example_sentence_cn: 分区围绕基准值分割数组。

words.example_sentence: The pivot is the reference element in quicksort.
words.code_snippet:
pivot = arr[len(arr)//2]
left = [x for x in arr if x < pivot]
words.example_sentence_cn: 基准是快速排序中的参考元素。

words.example_sentence: A repository stores all project files and history.
words.code_snippet:
git init
git clone https://github.com/user/repo.git
words.example_sentence_cn: 仓库存储所有项目文件和历史记录。

words.example_sentence: A commit saves changes to the local repository.
words.code_snippet:
git add .
git commit -m "add feature"
words.example_sentence_cn: 提交保存事务中的所有更改。

words.example_sentence: A branch is an independent line of development.
words.code_snippet:
git branch feature
git checkout feature
words.example_sentence_cn: 分支是独立的开发线路。

words.example_sentence: Merge combines changes from different branches.
words.code_snippet:
git checkout main
git merge feature
words.example_sentence_cn: 合并将不同分支的更改组合在一起。

words.example_sentence: Clone creates a local copy of a remote repository.
words.code_snippet: git clone https://github.com/user/repo.git
words.example_sentence_cn: 克隆创建远程仓库的本地副本。

words.example_sentence: Push uploads local commits to the remote repository.
words.code_snippet: git push origin main
words.example_sentence_cn: 推送将本地提交上传到远程仓库。

words.example_sentence: Pull downloads changes from the remote repository.
words.code_snippet: git pull origin main
words.example_sentence_cn: 拉取从远程仓库下载更改。

words.example_sentence: Fetch downloads changes without merging.
words.code_snippet: git fetch origin
words.example_sentence_cn: Fetch 从远程源检索数据。

words.example_sentence: Stage prepares changes for the next commit.
words.code_snippet:
git add file.py
git status
words.example_sentence_cn: 暂存为下一次提交准备更改。

words.example_sentence: The staging area holds changes before committing.
words.code_snippet:
git add .
git diff --staged
words.example_sentence_cn: 暂存区保存提交前的更改。

words.example_sentence: The working directory contains your project files.
words.code_snippet:
git status
pwd
words.example_sentence_cn: 工作目录包含你的项目文件。

words.example_sentence: A remote is a version of the repository hosted elsewhere.
words.code_snippet:
git remote -v
git remote add origin URL
words.example_sentence_cn: 远程是托管在其他地方的仓库版本。

words.example_sentence: Origin is the default name for the remote repository.
words.code_snippet: git push origin main
words.example_sentence_cn: origin 是远程仓库的默认名称。

words.example_sentence: Main is the default branch name.
words.code_snippet:
git checkout main
git merge feature
words.example_sentence_cn: main 是默认的分支名称。

words.example_sentence: HEAD points to the current commit.
words.code_snippet:
git log --oneline -5
# HEAD -> main
words.example_sentence_cn: HEAD 指向当前提交。

words.example_sentence: Diff shows changes between commits or files.
words.code_snippet:
git diff
git diff --staged
words.example_sentence_cn: diff 显示提交或文件之间的差异。

words.example_sentence: Log shows the commit history.
words.code_snippet:
git log --oneline
git log --graph
words.example_sentence_cn: 日志记录应用事件用于调试。

words.example_sentence: Status shows the current state of the working directory.
words.code_snippet: git status
words.example_sentence_cn: Status 代表当前状态。

words.example_sentence: Checkout switches to a different branch.
words.code_snippet:
git checkout feature
git checkout -b new-branch
words.example_sentence_cn: checkout 切换到不同的分支。

words.example_sentence: Stash temporarily saves uncommitted changes.
words.code_snippet:
git stash
git stash pop
words.example_sentence_cn: stash 临时保存未提交的更改。

words.example_sentence: A conflict occurs when merging incompatible changes.
words.code_snippet:
# After merge conflict:
git diff
# Fix manually, then:
git add .
git commit
words.example_sentence_cn: 冲突在合并不兼容的更改时发生。

words.example_sentence: Resolve conflicts by editing the conflicted files.
words.code_snippet:
# Edit file to fix <<<< ==== >>>>
git add resolved_file.py
git commit
words.example_sentence_cn: 解决冲突通过编辑冲突文件。

words.example_sentence: Rebase moves commits to a new base branch.
words.code_snippet:
git checkout feature
git rebase main
words.example_sentence_cn: 变基将提交移动到新的基础分支。

words.example_sentence: Cherry-pick applies a specific commit to another branch.
words.code_snippet:
git checkout main
git cherry-pick abc123
words.example_sentence_cn: 拣选将特定提交应用到另一个分支。

words.example_sentence: A tag marks a specific commit as important.
words.code_snippet:
git tag v1.0
git push origin v1.0
words.example_sentence_cn: 标签标记特定提交为重要。

words.example_sentence: Fork creates a personal copy of someone else's repository.
words.code_snippet:
# On GitHub: click Fork button
git clone https://github.com/YOUR/repo.git
words.example_sentence_cn: 复刻创建他人仓库的个人副本。

words.example_sentence: A pull request proposes changes to be merged.
words.code_snippet:
# On GitHub: click New Pull Request
git push origin feature
words.example_sentence_cn: 拉取请求提议要合并的更改。

words.example_sentence: An issue tracks bugs or feature requests.
words.code_snippet:
# On GitHub: click New Issue
# Link in commit: fixes #42
words.example_sentence_cn: 议题跟踪错误或功能请求。

words.example_sentence: .gitignore lists files Git should not track.
words.code_snippet:
# .gitignore content:
__pycache__/
*.pyc
.env
words.example_sentence_cn: .gitignore 列出 Git 不应跟踪的文件。

words.example_sentence: README describes the project for other developers.
words.code_snippet:
# README.md
# My Project
This is a sample project.
words.example_sentence_cn: README 为其他开发者描述项目。

words.example_sentence: A commit message describes what changed and why.
words.code_snippet: git commit -m "fix: resolve login bug"
words.example_sentence_cn: 提交信息描述了更改的内容和原因。

words.example_sentence: Each commit is a snapshot of the project state.
words.code_snippet:
git log --oneline
# abc123 snapshot 1
def456 snapshot 2
words.example_sentence_cn: 每次提交都是项目状态的快照。

words.example_sentence: Each commit has a unique SHA hash.
words.code_snippet:
git log --oneline
# abc1234 commit message
words.example_sentence_cn: 每次提交都有唯一的 SHA 哈希值。

words.example_sentence: SHA identifies commits with a unique string.
words.code_snippet:
git rev-parse HEAD
# Returns full SHA hash
words.example_sentence_cn: SHA 用唯一字符串标识提交。

words.example_sentence: Each commit references its parent commit.
words.code_snippet:
git log --oneline
# current -> parent -> grandparent
words.example_sentence_cn: 每个提交引用其父提交。

words.example_sentence: Compare changes between two commits.
words.code_snippet:
git diff abc123 def456
git diff HEAD~1
words.example_sentence_cn: diff 显示提交或文件之间的差异。

words.example_sentence: Reset moves HEAD to a specified commit.
words.code_snippet:
git reset --soft HEAD~1
git reset --hard HEAD~1
words.example_sentence_cn: reset 将 HEAD 移动到指定提交。

words.example_sentence: Revert creates a new commit that undoes changes.
words.code_snippet: git revert abc123
words.example_sentence_cn: revert 创建一个撤消更改的新提交。

words.example_sentence: Blame shows who last modified each line.
words.code_snippet: git blame file.py
words.example_sentence_cn: blame 显示谁最后修改了每一行。

words.example_sentence: Bisect finds the commit that introduced a bug.
words.code_snippet:
git bisect start
git bisect bad
git bisect good abc123
words.example_sentence_cn: bisect 找到引入错误的提交。

words.example_sentence: A submodule includes another repository inside yours.
words.code_snippet:
git submodule add URL path
git submodule update --init
words.example_sentence_cn: 子模块在你的仓库中包含另一个仓库。

words.example_sentence: Hooks run scripts on Git events.
words.example_sentence_cn: 钩子在 Git 事件上运行脚本。

words.example_sentence: A workflow defines how a team uses Git.
words.code_snippet:
# Feature branch workflow:
# 1. Create branch
# 2. Make changes
# 3. Open PR
# 4. Merge
words.example_sentence_cn: 工作流定义团队如何使用 Git。

words.example_sentence: Version control tracks changes over time.
words.code_snippet:
git tag v1.0.0
git tag v1.0.1
words.example_sentence_cn: 版本控制跟踪随时间的更改。

words.example_sentence: Git tracks changes to managed files.
words.code_snippet:
git add new_file.py
git status
words.example_sentence_cn: Git 跟踪受管理文件的更改。

words.example_sentence: Untracked files are not yet managed by Git.
words.code_snippet:
git status
# Untracked files:
#   new_file.py
words.example_sentence_cn: 未跟踪的文件尚未被 Git 管理。

words.example_sentence: Modified files have unsaved changes.
words.code_snippet:
git status
# Modified: file.py
words.example_sentence_cn: 已修改的文件有未保存的更改。

words.example_sentence: Staged files are ready to be committed.
words.code_snippet:
git diff --staged
git commit -m "message"
words.example_sentence_cn: 已暂存的文件准备好提交。

words.example_sentence: HTTP is the protocol for web communication.
words.code_snippet:
import requests
r = requests.get("https://example.com")
print(r.status_code)
words.example_sentence_cn: HTTP 是网络通信的协议。

words.example_sentence: HTTPS encrypts HTTP traffic with TLS.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.get("https://example.com")
print(r.url)
words.example_sentence_cn: HTTPS 用 TLS 加密 HTTP 流量。

words.example_sentence: A URL specifies the address of a resource.
words.code_snippet:
url = "https://example.com/api/data"
r = requests.get(url)
words.example_sentence_cn: URL 指定资源的地址。

words.example_sentence: A request is sent from client to server.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.get("https://api.example.com")
print(r.text)
words.example_sentence_cn: Request 代表传入的 HTTP 数据。

words.example_sentence: A response is sent from server to client.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.post(url, json={"key": "value"})
print(r.json())
words.example_sentence_cn: Response 存储 API 的返回值。

words.example_sentence: GET retrieves data from the server.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.get("https://api.example.com/users")
users = r.json()
words.example_sentence_cn: GET 从服务器检索数据。

words.example_sentence: POST sends data to create a resource.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.post(url, json={"name": "Alice"})
print(r.status_code)
words.example_sentence_cn: POST 发送数据以创建资源。

words.example_sentence: PUT updates an existing resource.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.put(url, json={"name": "Bob"})
print(r.status_code)
words.example_sentence_cn: PUT 更新现有资源。

words.example_sentence: DELETE removes a resource from the server.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.delete(url)
print(r.status_code)
words.example_sentence_cn: DELETE 从表中移除行。

words.example_sentence: PATCH partially updates a resource.
words.code_snippet: r = requests.patch(url, json={"email": "new@email.com"})
words.example_sentence_cn: PATCH 部分更新资源。

words.example_sentence: Status code indicates the result of a request.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.get(url)
print(r.status_code)  # 200
words.example_sentence_cn: 状态码表示请求的结果。

words.example_sentence: 200 means the request was successful.
words.example_sentence_cn: 200 表示请求成功。

words.example_sentence: 404 means the resource was not found.
words.example_sentence_cn: 404 表示资源未找到。

words.example_sentence: 500 means an internal server error occurred.
words.example_sentence_cn: 500 表示发生内部服务器错误。

words.example_sentence: Headers contain metadata about the request.
words.code_snippet:
headers = {"Authorization": "Bearer token"}
r = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
words.example_sentence_cn: 头信息包含请求的元数据。

words.example_sentence: The body contains the data sent with POST/PUT.
words.code_snippet:
body = {"name": "Alice", "age": 25}
r = requests.post(url, json=body)
words.example_sentence_cn: 请求体包含 POST/PUT 发送的数据。

words.example_sentence: Cookies store small pieces of data in the browser.
words.code_snippet:
cookies = {"session": "abc123"}
r = requests.get(url, cookies=cookies)
words.example_sentence_cn: Cookie 在浏览器中存储小数据。

words.example_sentence: A session maintains state across requests.
words.code_snippet:
s = requests.Session()
s.get(url)
s.post(url, data={})
words.example_sentence_cn: 会话在服务器上存储用户状态。

words.example_sentence: An API defines how programs communicate.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.get("https://api.github.com/users")
print(r.json())
words.example_sentence_cn: API 定义程序如何通信。

words.example_sentence: REST is an architectural style for APIs.
words.code_snippet:
# RESTful endpoints:
GET /users
POST /users
PUT /users/1
DELETE /users/1
words.example_sentence_cn: REST 是 API 的架构风格。

words.example_sentence: JSON is a lightweight data format.
words.example_sentence_cn: JSON 是轻量级的数据格式。

words.example_sentence: The client sends requests to the server.
words.code_snippet:
import requests
client = requests.Session()
r = client.get(url)
words.example_sentence_cn: 客户端向服务器发送请求。

words.example_sentence: The server processes requests and returns responses.
words.example_sentence_cn: 服务器处理请求并返回响应。

words.example_sentence: An endpoint is a specific API URL path.
words.example_sentence_cn: 端点是特定的 API 操作 URL。

words.example_sentence: A route maps a URL pattern to a handler.
words.code_snippet:
@app.get("/about")
def about(): return "About page"
words.example_sentence_cn: 路由将 URL 模式映射到处理程序。

words.example_sentence: Query strings pass parameters in the URL.
words.code_snippet:
# URL: /search?q=python&page=1
q = request.query_params.get("q")
words.example_sentence_cn: 查询字符串在 URL 中传递参数。

words.example_sentence: Path parameters are part of the URL path.
words.code_snippet:
@app.get("/users/{user_id}")
def get_user(user_id: int): pass
words.example_sentence_cn: 路径参数是 URL 路径的一部分。

words.example_sentence: Content-Type header specifies the data format.
words.code_snippet:
headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
r = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json={})
words.example_sentence_cn: Content-Type 头指定数据格式。

words.example_sentence: Authorization verifies user permissions.
words.code_snippet:
headers = {"Authorization": "Bearer mytoken"}
r = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
words.example_sentence_cn: 授权检查用户可以做什么。

words.example_sentence: A token authenticates API requests.
words.code_snippet:
token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9"
headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}
words.example_sentence_cn: 词元是文本处理的基本单位。

words.example_sentence: CORS allows cross-origin requests.
words.code_snippet:
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
app.add_middleware(CORSMiddleware, allow_origins=["*"])
words.example_sentence_cn: CORS 控制哪些域可以访问你的 API。

words.example_sentence: Middleware processes requests before they reach the handler.
words.code_snippet:
@app.middleware("http")
async def add_header(request, call_next):
    response = await call_next(request)
    return response
words.example_sentence_cn: 中间件在处理程序之前处理请求。

words.example_sentence: The payload is the data sent in a request body.
words.code_snippet:
payload = {"name": "Alice", "email": "alice@example.com"}
r = requests.post(url, json=payload)
words.example_sentence_cn: 载荷是请求体中发送的数据。

words.example_sentence: Timeout limits how long a request can wait.
words.code_snippet:
r = requests.get(url, timeout=5)
# Timeout after 5 seconds
words.example_sentence_cn: 超时限制请求可以等待多长时间。

words.example_sentence: Retry failed requests automatically.
words.code_snippet:
from requests.adapters import HTTPAdapter
s = requests.Session()
s.mount("https://", HTTPAdapter(max_retries=3))
words.example_sentence_cn: 重试自动重新发送失败的请求。

words.example_sentence: Caching stores responses to avoid repeated requests.
words.code_snippet:
headers = {"Cache-Control": "max-age=3600"}
r = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
words.example_sentence_cn: 缓存存储响应以避免重复请求。

words.example_sentence: DNS translates domain names to IP addresses.
words.code_snippet:
import socket
ip = socket.gethostbyname("example.com")
print(ip)
words.example_sentence_cn: DNS 将域名翻译为 IP 地址。

words.example_sentence: TCP provides reliable data transmission.
words.code_snippet:
import socket
s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
words.example_sentence_cn: TCP 提供可靠的数据传输。

words.example_sentence: An IP address identifies a device on a network.
words.code_snippet:
import socket
hostname = socket.gethostname()
ip = socket.gethostbyname(hostname)
words.example_sentence_cn: IP 地址标识网络上的设备。

words.example_sentence: A port identifies a specific service on a host.
words.code_snippet: uvicorn.run(app, host="127.0.0.1", port=8000)
words.example_sentence_cn: 端口标识主机上的特定服务。

words.example_sentence: Localhost refers to the local machine.
words.code_snippet: uvicorn.run(app, host="127.0.0.1", port=8000)
words.example_sentence_cn: localhost 指本地机器。

words.example_sentence: A webhook sends real-time notifications to a URL.
words.example_sentence_cn: Webhook 在事件时发送 HTTP 回调。

words.example_sentence: Polling repeatedly checks for updates.
words.code_snippet:
import time
while True:
    r = requests.get(url)
    if r.json().get("done"): break
    time.sleep(1)
words.example_sentence_cn: 轮询重复检查更新。

words.example_sentence: WebSocket enables real-time bidirectional communication.
words.code_snippet:
import websockets
async def handler(ws):
    async for msg in ws:
        await ws.send(msg)
words.example_sentence_cn: WebSocket 实现实时通信。

words.example_sentence: A database stores and organizes data.
words.code_snippet:
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect("mydb.db")
words.example_sentence_cn: 数据库存储和组织数据。

words.example_sentence: A table stores data in rows and columns.
words.example_sentence_cn: 表以行和列的形式存储数据。

words.example_sentence: A row represents a single record.
words.code_snippet:
INSERT INTO users (name) VALUES ('Alice');
SELECT * FROM users;
words.example_sentence_cn: 行代表单条记录。

words.example_sentence: A column defines a field in a table.
words.code_snippet:
ALTER TABLE users ADD email TEXT;
SELECT name, email FROM users;
words.example_sentence_cn: 列定义表中的字段。

words.example_sentence: SQL is the standard language for databases.
words.code_snippet: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = 1;
words.example_sentence_cn: SQL 是数据库的标准语言。

words.example_sentence: A query retrieves data from the database.
words.code_snippet: SELECT name, email FROM users WHERE age > 18;
words.example_sentence_cn: 查询从数据库检索数据。

words.example_sentence: SELECT retrieves data from a table.
words.code_snippet: SELECT id, name FROM users ORDER BY name;
words.example_sentence_cn: SELECT 从表中检索数据。

words.example_sentence: INSERT adds new rows to a table.
words.code_snippet: INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('Alice', 'alice@test.com');
words.example_sentence_cn: INSERT 向表中添加新行。

words.example_sentence: UPDATE modifies existing rows.
words.code_snippet: UPDATE users SET email = 'new@email.com' WHERE id = 1;
words.example_sentence_cn: UPDATE 修改现有行。

words.example_sentence: DELETE removes rows from a table.
words.code_snippet: DELETE FROM users WHERE id = 1;
words.example_sentence_cn: DELETE 从表中移除行。

words.example_sentence: WHERE filters rows based on a condition.
words.code_snippet: SELECT * FROM users WHERE age >= 18;
words.example_sentence_cn: WHERE 根据条件过滤行。

words.example_sentence: JOIN combines rows from multiple tables.
words.example_sentence_cn: JOIN 组合多个表的行。

words.example_sentence: A primary key uniquely identifies each row.
words.example_sentence_cn: 主键唯一标识每行。

words.example_sentence: A foreign key links to another table's primary key.
words.example_sentence_cn: 外键链接到另一个表的主键。

words.example_sentence: An index speeds up data retrieval.
words.code_snippet:
CREATE INDEX idx_email ON users(email);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = 'test@test.com';
words.example_sentence_cn: Index 代表序列中的位置。

words.example_sentence: A schema defines the database structure.
words.example_sentence_cn: 模式定义数据库结构。

words.example_sentence: ORM maps database tables to Python classes.
words.code_snippet:
from sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase
class Base(DeclarativeBase): pass
words.example_sentence_cn: ORM 将数据库表映射到 Python 类。

words.example_sentence: Migration applies schema changes to the database.
words.code_snippet:
# alembic migration
alembic upgrade head
alembic downgrade -1
words.example_sentence_cn: 迁移将模式更改应用到数据库。

words.example_sentence: A transaction groups operations that must all succeed.
words.example_sentence_cn: 事务将必须全部成功的操作分组。

words.example_sentence: Commit saves all changes in a transaction.
words.code_snippet: db.commit()
words.example_sentence_cn: 提交保存事务中的所有更改。

words.example_sentence: Rollback undoes all changes in a transaction.
words.example_sentence_cn: 回滚撤消事务中的所有更改。

words.example_sentence: ACID ensures reliable database transactions.
words.example_sentence_cn: ACID 确保可靠的数据库事务。

words.example_sentence: Normalization reduces data redundancy.
words.code_snippet:
# Before: users(id, name, order1, order2)
# After: users(id, name) + orders(id, user_id)
words.example_sentence_cn: 规范化减少数据冗余。

words.example_sentence: Aggregate functions summarize multiple rows.
words.code_snippet: SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(age) FROM users GROUP BY city;
words.example_sentence_cn: 聚合函数汇总多行。

words.example_sentence: GROUP BY groups rows with the same value.
words.code_snippet: SELECT city, COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY city;
words.example_sentence_cn: GROUP BY 将具有相同值的行分组。

words.example_sentence: ORDER BY sorts the result set.
words.code_snippet: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY name ASC;
words.example_sentence_cn: ORDER BY 对结果集排序。

words.example_sentence: LIMIT restricts the number of rows returned.
words.code_snippet: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;
words.example_sentence_cn: LIMIT 限制返回的行数。

words.example_sentence: OFFSET skips a number of rows for pagination.
words.code_snippet: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
words.example_sentence_cn: OFFSET 跳过指定行数用于分页。

words.example_sentence: COUNT returns the number of rows.
words.code_snippet: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE age > 18;
words.example_sentence_cn: COUNT 返回行数。

words.example_sentence: SUM adds up numeric values.
words.code_snippet: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM orders WHERE user_id = 1;
words.example_sentence_cn: SUM 累加数值。

words.example_sentence: AVG calculates the mean value.
words.code_snippet: SELECT AVG(age) FROM users;
words.example_sentence_cn: AVG 计算平均值。

words.example_sentence: MAX returns the highest value.
words.code_snippet: SELECT MAX(score) FROM results;
words.example_sentence_cn: MAX 返回最高值。

words.example_sentence: MIN returns the lowest value.
words.code_snippet: SELECT MIN(price) FROM products;
words.example_sentence_cn: MIN 返回最低值。

words.example_sentence: HAVING filters groups after GROUP BY.
words.code_snippet:
SELECT city, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM users
GROUP BY city
HAVING cnt > 5;
words.example_sentence_cn: HAVING 在 GROUP BY 之后过滤分组。

words.example_sentence: UNION combines results from multiple SELECT statements.
words.example_sentence_cn: UNION 组合多个 SELECT 语句的结果。

words.example_sentence: A subquery is a query inside another query.
words.code_snippet:
SELECT * FROM users
WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders);
words.example_sentence_cn: 子查询是另一个查询内的查询。

words.example_sentence: A view is a virtual table based on a query.
words.code_snippet:
CREATE VIEW active_users AS
SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = 'active';
words.example_sentence_cn: 视图是基于查询的虚拟表。

words.example_sentence: A trigger runs automatically on table events.
words.example_sentence_cn: 触发器在表事件上自动运行。

words.example_sentence: A stored procedure is a precompiled SQL routine.
words.example_sentence_cn: 存储过程是预编译的 SQL 例程。

words.example_sentence: A constraint enforces rules on data.
words.example_sentence_cn: 约束对数据强制执行规则。

words.example_sentence: NULL represents missing or unknown data.
words.code_snippet: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email IS NULL;
words.example_sentence_cn: NULL 表示缺失或未知的数据。

words.example_sentence: NOT NULL prevents a column from having NULL values.
words.example_sentence_cn: NOT NULL 防止列有 NULL 值。

words.example_sentence: UNIQUE ensures all values in a column are different.
words.example_sentence_cn: UNIQUE 确保列中的所有值不同。

words.example_sentence: DEFAULT provides a value when none is specified.
words.example_sentence_cn: DEFAULT 在未指定时提供默认值。

words.example_sentence: ALTER TABLE modifies an existing table structure.
words.code_snippet:
ALTER TABLE users ADD phone TEXT;
ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN phone;
words.example_sentence_cn: ALTER TABLE 修改现有表结构。

words.example_sentence: DROP TABLE permanently deletes a table.
words.code_snippet: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_data;
words.example_sentence_cn: DROP TABLE 永久删除表。

words.example_sentence: TRUNCATE removes all rows but keeps the table structure.
words.code_snippet: TRUNCATE TABLE logs;
words.example_sentence_cn: TRUNCATE 移除所有行但保留表结构。

words.example_sentence: SQLite is a lightweight file-based database.
words.code_snippet:
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect("app.db")
cursor = conn.cursor()
words.example_sentence_cn: SQLite 是轻量级的文件数据库。

words.example_sentence: A cursor executes SQL and fetches results.
words.code_snippet:
cursor = conn.cursor()
cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM users")
rows = cursor.fetchall()
words.example_sentence_cn: Cursor 执行数据库查询。

words.example_sentence: A decorator modifies a function's behavior.
words.example_sentence_cn: 装饰器修改函数的行为。

words.example_sentence: A generator yields values lazily one at a time.
words.example_sentence_cn: 生成器惰性地逐个产生值。

words.example_sentence: Lambda creates a small anonymous function.
words.code_snippet:
square = lambda x: x ** 2
print(square(5))

nums = [1, 2, 3]
print(sorted(nums, key=lambda x: -x))
words.example_sentence_cn: Lambda 创建小型匿名函数。

words.example_sentence: List comprehension creates lists concisely.
words.code_snippet:
squares = [x**2 for x in range(10)]
evens = [x for x in range(20) if x % 2 == 0]
print(squares, evens)
words.example_sentence_cn: 列表推导式简洁地创建列表。

words.example_sentence: Dictionary comprehension creates dicts concisely.
words.example_sentence_cn: 字典推导式简洁地创建字典。

words.example_sentence: Enumerate adds a counter to an iterable.
words.example_sentence_cn: Enumerate 为可迭代对象添加计数器。

words.example_sentence: Zip pairs elements from multiple iterables.
words.code_snippet:
names = ['Alice', 'Bob']
ages = [25, 30]
for name, age in zip(names, ages):
    print(name, age)
words.example_sentence_cn: Zip 配对多个可迭代对象的元素。

words.example_sentence: Map applies a function to every element.
words.code_snippet:
nums = [1, 2, 3, 4]
squared = list(map(lambda x: x**2, nums))
print(squared)
words.example_sentence_cn: Map 将函数应用到每个元素。

words.example_sentence: Filter keeps elements that pass a test.
words.code_snippet:
nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
evens = list(filter(lambda x: x % 2 == 0, nums))
print(evens)
words.example_sentence_cn: Filter 选择符合条件的元素。

words.example_sentence: Reduce applies a function cumulatively to elements.
words.code_snippet:
from functools import reduce
nums = [1, 2, 3, 4]
sum_val = reduce(lambda a, b: a + b, nums)
print(sum_val)
words.example_sentence_cn: Reduce 对元素累积应用函数。

words.example_sentence: Try-except catches and handles exceptions.
words.example_sentence_cn: Try-except 捕获并处理异常。

words.example_sentence: Raise creates a new exception.
words.example_sentence_cn: Raise 创建一个新异常。

words.example_sentence: With statement ensures proper resource cleanup.
words.code_snippet:
with open('file.txt', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()
print(content)
words.example_sentence_cn: With 语句确保正确的资源清理。

words.example_sentence: Open reads or writes files.
words.code_snippet:
with open('data.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write('Hello World')
words.example_sentence_cn: Open 读取或写入文件。

words.example_sentence: Read gets content from a file.
words.code_snippet:
with open('file.txt', 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
print(lines)
words.example_sentence_cn: Read 从文件获取内容。

words.example_sentence: Write saves content to a file.
words.code_snippet:
with open('log.txt', 'a') as f:
    f.write('New log entry\n')
words.example_sentence_cn: Write 将内容保存到文件。

words.example_sentence: Assert checks if a condition is true.
words.example_sentence_cn: Assert 检查条件是否为真。

words.example_sentence: Isinstance checks if an object is a specific type.
words.code_snippet:
x = 42
print(isinstance(x, int))  # True
print(isinstance(x, str))  # False
words.example_sentence_cn: Isinstance 检查对象是否为特定类型。

words.example_sentence: Type hints document expected types.
words.code_snippet:
def greet(name: str) -> str:
    return f'Hello, {name}'
words.example_sentence_cn: 类型注解记录期望的类型。

words.example_sentence: Dataclass auto-generates init and repr methods.
words.example_sentence_cn: 数据类自动生成 init 和 repr 方法。

words.example_sentence: Async allows non-blocking concurrent execution.
words.code_snippet:
import asyncio

async def fetch_data():
    await asyncio.sleep(1)
    return 'done'

result = asyncio.run(fetch_data())
words.example_sentence_cn: Async 允许非阻塞的并发执行。

words.example_sentence: Await pauses until an async operation completes.
words.code_snippet:
async def main():
    result = await fetch_data()
    print(result)

asyncio.run(main())
words.example_sentence_cn: Await 暂停直到异步操作完成。

words.example_sentence: Pip installs Python packages.
words.code_snippet:
pip install requests
pip install fastapi uvicorn
pip freeze > requirements.txt
words.example_sentence_cn: Pip 安装 Python 包。

words.example_sentence: Virtual environments isolate project dependencies.
words.code_snippet:
python -m venv myenv
source myenv/bin/activate
pip install requests
words.example_sentence_cn: 虚拟环境隔离项目依赖。

words.example_sentence: requirements.txt lists project dependencies.
words.code_snippet:
pip freeze > requirements.txt
pip install -r requirements.txt
words.example_sentence_cn: requirements.txt 列出项目依赖。

words.example_sentence: PEP 8 is Python's official style guide.

# PEP 8 rules:
# 4 spaces indentation
# max 79 chars per line
# snake_case for functions
words.example_sentence_cn: PEP 8 是 Python 的官方风格指南。

words.example_sentence: Self refers to the current instance of a class.

words.example_sentence: Property creates managed attributes.

words.example_sentence: Class methods receive the class as first argument.
words.example_sentence_cn: 类方法接收类作为第一个参数。

words.example_sentence: Super calls a method from the parent class.
words.example_sentence_cn: Super 调用父类的方法。

words.example_sentence: Abstract classes cannot be instantiated directly.
words.example_sentence_cn: 抽象类不能直接实例化。

words.example_sentence: Protocol defines structural typing interfaces.
words.example_sentence_cn: Protocol 定义结构化类型接口。

words.example_sentence: Typing module provides type annotation support.
words.example_sentence_cn: Typing 模块提供类型注解支持。

words.example_sentence: Optional means the value can be None.
words.example_sentence_cn: Optional 表示值可以是 None。

words.example_sentence: List type hints specify a list of elements.
words.example_sentence_cn: List 类型注解指定元素列表。

words.example_sentence: Dict type hints specify key-value types.
words.example_sentence_cn: Dict 类型注解指定键值类型。

words.example_sentence: Tuple type hints specify fixed-length sequences.
words.example_sentence_cn: Tuple 类型注解指定固定长度序列。

words.example_sentence: Any accepts any type of value.
words.example_sentence_cn: Any 接受任何类型的值。

words.example_sentence: Union allows multiple possible types.
words.example_sentence_cn: Union 允许多种可能的类型。

words.example_sentence: Match statement pattern-matches values (Python 3.10+).
words.code_snippet:
status = 404
match status:
    case 200:
        print('OK')
    case 404:
        print('Not found')
    case _:
        print('Unknown')

words.example_sentence: Walrus operator := assigns and returns a value.
words.example_sentence_cn: 海象运算符 := 赋值并返回值。

words.example_sentence: F-strings embed expressions inside strings.
words.code_snippet:
name = 'Alice'
age = 25
print(f'{name} is {age} years old')

words.example_sentence: Unpacking assigns multiple values at once.
words.code_snippet:
a, b, c = [1, 2, 3]
first, *rest = [1, 2, 3, 4]
print(first, rest)

words.example_sentence: Mutable objects can be changed after creation.
words.code_snippet:
lst = [1, 2, 3]
lst.append(4)
print(lst)  # [1, 2, 3, 4]

words.example_sentence: Immutable objects cannot be changed after creation.
words.code_snippet:
t = (1, 2, 3)
# t[0] = 10  # TypeError!

words.example_sentence_cn: 不可变对象在创建后不能更改。

words.example_sentence: Scope determines where a variable is accessible.
words.code_snippet:
x = 'global'
def foo():
    x = 'local'
    print(x)
foo()
print(x)

words.example_sentence: A framework provides reusable code for building apps.

from fastapi import FastAPI
app = FastAPI()

words.example_sentence: Django is a full-featured Python web framework.

from django.urls import path
urlpatterns = [path('admin/', admin.site.urls)]
words.example_sentence_cn: Django 是全功能的 Python Web 框架。

words.example_sentence: Flask is a lightweight Python web framework.

from flask import Flask
app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/')
def home(): return 'Hello'

words.example_sentence_cn: FastAPI 是现代异步 Python Web 框架。

from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates

words.example_sentence_cn: 模板用动态数据生成 HTML。

from pydantic import BaseModel
class LoginForm(BaseModel):
    username: str
    password: str

words.example_sentence: Submit sends form data to the server.

<form action='/login' method='POST'>
  <input name='user'>
  <button type='submit'>Login</button>
</form>
words.example_sentence_cn: 提交将表单数据发送到服务器。

words.example_sentence: Authentication verifies user identity.
words.example_sentence_cn: 认证验证用户身份。

words.example_sentence: Authorization checks what a user can do.
words.example_sentence_cn: 授权检查用户可以做什么。

words.example_sentence: OAuth allows third-party apps to access user data.

# OAuth2 flow:

# 3. App exchanges code for token

words.example_sentence: JWT is a compact token format for authentication.
words.example_sentence_cn: JWT 是紧凑的认证令牌格式。

words.example_sentence: Password hashing stores passwords securely.

from passlib.context import CryptContext
pwd = CryptContext(schemes=['bcrypt'])
hashed = pwd.hash('mypassword')
words.example_sentence_cn: 密码哈希安全地存储密码。

words.example_sentence: Cookies store small data in the browser.
words.code_snippet: response.set_cookie(key='session', value='abc123')
words.example_sentence_cn: Cookie 在浏览器中存储小数据。

words.example_sentence: Sessions store user state on the server.
words.example_sentence_cn: 会话在服务器上存储用户状态。

from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
app.add_middleware(CORSMiddleware, allow_origins=['*'])

words.example_sentence: Pydantic validates data using Python type hints.

    name: str
    age: int

user = User(name='Alice', age=25)

words.example_sentence_cn: Target 存储操作的目标对象或目的地。

words.example_sentence: SyntaxError means the code has invalid syntax.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
print('hello'
# Missing closing parenthesis
words.example_sentence_cn: SyntaxError 表示代码有无效语法。

words.example_sentence: TypeError occurs when operation on wrong type.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
result = '5' + 3
# Fix:
result = int('5') + 3
words.example_sentence_cn: TypeError 在操作错误类型时发生。

words.example_sentence: ValueError occurs when a value is inappropriate.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
n = int('abc')
# Fix:
try:
    n = int(input())
except ValueError:
    print('Invalid number')
words.example_sentence_cn: ValueError 在值不合适时发生。

words.example_sentence: NameError occurs when variable is not defined.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
print(x)  # x not defined
# Fix:
x = 10
print(x)
words.example_sentence_cn: NameError 在变量未定义时发生。

words.example_sentence: IndexError occurs when accessing invalid index.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
lst = [1, 2, 3]
print(lst[10])
# Fix:
if len(lst) > 10:
    print(lst[10])
words.example_sentence_cn: IndexError 在访问无效索引时发生。

words.example_sentence: KeyError occurs when dictionary key doesn't exist.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
d = {'a': 1}
print(d['b'])
# Fix:
print(d.get('b', 'default'))
words.example_sentence_cn: KeyError 在字典键不存在时发生。

words.example_sentence: AttributeError occurs when accessing non-existent attribute.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
None.append(1)
# Fix:
if lst is not None:
    lst.append(1)
words.example_sentence_cn: AttributeError 在访问不存在的属性时发生。

words.example_sentence: ImportError occurs when module cannot be imported.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
import nonexistent_module
# Fix:
pip install nonexistent_module
words.example_sentence_cn: ImportError 在模块无法导入时发生。

words.example_sentence: ModuleNotFoundError means the module is not installed.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
import pandas
# Fix:
pip install pandas
words.example_sentence_cn: ModuleNotFoundError 表示模块未安装。

words.example_sentence: FileNotFoundError occurs when file doesn't exist.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
with open('missing.txt') as f:
    content = f.read()
# Fix:
import os
if os.path.exists('missing.txt'):
    with open('missing.txt') as f:
        content = f.read()
words.example_sentence_cn: FileNotFoundError 在文件不存在时发生。

words.example_sentence: PermissionError occurs when access is denied.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
with open('/etc/passwd', 'w') as f:
    f.write('data')
# Fix: Check permissions first
words.example_sentence_cn: PermissionError 在访问被拒绝时发生。

words.example_sentence: ZeroDivisionError occurs when dividing by zero.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
result = 10 / 0
# Fix:
if denominator != 0:
    result = 10 / denominator
words.example_sentence_cn: ZeroDivisionError 在除以零时发生。

words.example_sentence: StopIteration occurs when iterator is exhausted.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
iter_obj = iter([1, 2, 3])
while True:
    value = next(iter_obj)
# Fix: Use for loop instead
words.example_sentence_cn: StopIteration 在迭代器耗尽时发生。

words.example_sentence: RecursionError occurs when recursion is too deep.
words.example_sentence_cn: RecursionError 在递归太深时发生。

words.example_sentence: TimeoutError occurs when operation takes too long.
words.example_sentence_cn: TimeoutError 在操作超时时发生。

words.example_sentence: ConnectionError occurs when network connection fails.
words.example_sentence_cn: ConnectionError 在网络连接失败时发生。

words.example_sentence: HTTPError occurs when server returns error status.
words.example_sentence_cn: HTTPError 在服务器返回错误状态时发生。

words.example_sentence: AssertionError occurs when assert fails.
words.code_snippet:
# Wrong:
assert 1 == 2, 'Numbers not equal'
# Fix: Check your logic
words.example_sentence_cn: AssertionError 在断言失败时发生。

words.example_sentence: NotImplementedError indicates method needs implementation.
words.example_sentence_cn: NotImplementedError 表示方法需要实现。

words.example_sentence: Traceback shows the error call stack.
words.code_snippet:
# Traceback (most recent call last):
#   File 'main.py', line 5, in <module>
#     result = 10 / 0
# ZeroDivisionError: division by zero
words.example_sentence_cn: 回溯信息显示错误调用栈。

words.example_sentence: Depends injects dependencies into route handlers.
words.example_sentence_cn: Depends 将依赖注入到路由处理程序。

words.example_sentence: APIRouter groups related routes together.
words.code_snippet:
from fastapi import APIRouter
router = APIRouter(prefix='/api/users', tags=['users'])

@router.get('/')
def list_users(): return []
words.example_sentence_cn: APIRouter 将相关路由分组。

words.example_sentence: BaseModel defines request/response data structure.
words.code_snippet:
from pydantic import BaseModel
class UserCreate(BaseModel):
    name: str
    email: str
    age: int = 0
words.example_sentence_cn: BaseModel 定义请求/响应数据结构。

words.example_sentence: Status_code sets the HTTP response code.
words.example_sentence_cn: Status_code 设置 HTTP 响应代码。

words.example_sentence: HTTPException returns error responses to clients.
words.example_sentence_cn: HTTPException 向客户端返回错误响应。

words.example_sentence: Query defines URL query parameters.
words.example_sentence_cn: Query 定义 URL 查询参数。

words.example_sentence: Path defines URL path parameters.
words.example_sentence_cn: Path 定义 URL 路径参数。

words.example_sentence: Body defines the request body content.
words.example_sentence_cn: Body 定义请求体内容。

words.example_sentence: BackgroundTasks runs tasks after response is sent.
words.example_sentence_cn: BackgroundTasks 在响应发送后运行任务。

words.example_sentence: File handles file uploads.
words.example_sentence_cn: File 处理文件上传。

words.example_sentence: WebSocket enables real-time communication.
words.code_snippet:
from fastapi import WebSocket
@app.websocket('/ws')
async def ws(ws: WebSocket):
    await ws.accept()
    data = await ws.receive_text()
    await ws.send_text(f'Echo: {data}')
words.example_sentence_cn: WebSocket 实现实时通信。

words.example_sentence: TestClient tests API without starting the server.
words.code_snippet:
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
client = TestClient(app)
response = client.get('/')
assert response.status_code == 200
words.example_sentence_cn: TestClient 在不启动服务器的情况下测试 API。

words.example_sentence: Get_db is a common dependency for DB sessions.
words.code_snippet:
def get_db():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()

db = Depends(get_db)
words.example_sentence_cn: Get_db 是获取数据库会话的常见依赖。

words.example_sentence: Tags organize API endpoints in documentation.

router = APIRouter(prefix='/api/users', tags=['users'])

# In Swagger UI, endpoints grouped under 'users' tag

words.example_sentence: Response_model defines the API response structure.

# Linux commands:
ls -la
cd /home
mkdir project

#!/bin/bash
echo 'Hello World'
for f in *.py; do
    echo $f
done

words.example_sentence: SSH connects to remote servers securely.
words.code_snippet:
ssh user@192.168.1.100
ssh -i key.pem ec2-user@server.com
words.example_sentence_cn: SSH 安全地连接到远程服务器。

words.code_snippet:
chmod +x start.sh
chmod 755 script.py
chmod 600 secret.key

sudo systemctl start nginx
sudo systemctl enable myapp
sudo systemctl status myapp

words.example_sentence: Nginx is a web server and reverse proxy.

docker build -t myapp .
docker run -p 8000:8000 myapp
docker ps

words.code_snippet:
# docker-compose.yml
version: '3'
services:
  web:
    build: .
    ports:
      - '8000:8000'
  db:
    image: postgres

words.example_sentence: Environment variables configure apps without code changes.
words.code_snippet:
export DATABASE_URL='sqlite:///app.db'
export SECRET_KEY='my-secret'

import os
DB = os.getenv('DATABASE_URL')

words.example_sentence: Supervisor keeps apps running continuously.
words.code_snippet:
# /etc/supervisor/conf.d/myapp.conf
[program:myapp]
command=/usr/bin/python main.py
directory=/app
autostart=true

words.example_sentence: Cron runs scheduled tasks automatically.
words.code_snippet:
# crontab -e
# Run backup every day at 2am
0 2 * * * /usr/bin/python /app/backup.py

words.example_sentence: Logs record application events for debugging.

import logging
logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
logger.info('Server started')

words.example_sentence: A model learns patterns from data.

from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
model = LinearRegression()
model.fit(X_train, y_train)

words.example_sentence: Train teaches the model using data.
words.code_snippet:
model.fit(X_train, y_train)
# model is now trained
words.example_sentence_cn: 训练用数据教会模型。

words.example_sentence: Predict uses the model to make predictions.
words.code_snippet:
predictions = model.predict(X_test)
print(predictions[:5])
words.example_sentence_cn: 预测使用模型做出预测。

words.example_sentence: A dataset is a collection of training data.
words.code_snippet:
from sklearn.datasets import load_iris
data = load_iris()
X, y = data.data, data.target
words.example_sentence_cn: 数据集是训练数据的集合。

words.example_sentence: Features are input variables for the model.
words.code_snippet:
X = df[['age', 'income', 'education']]
y = df['purchased']
words.example_sentence_cn: 特征是模型的输入变量。

words.example_sentence: Labels are the target values to predict.
words.code_snippet:
X = df.drop('target', axis=1)  # features
y = df['target']  # labels
words.example_sentence_cn: 标签是要预测的目标值。

words.example_sentence: Accuracy measures correct predictions ratio.
words.code_snippet:
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score
acc = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions)
print(f'Accuracy: {acc:.2f}')
words.example_sentence_cn: 准确率衡量正确预测的比例。

words.example_sentence: Loss measures how wrong the model's predictions are.
words.code_snippet:
import torch.nn as nn
criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()
loss = criterion(outputs, labels)
words.example_sentence_cn: 损失衡量模型预测的错误程度。

words.example_sentence: An epoch is one pass through the entire dataset.
words.example_sentence_cn: 轮次是整个数据集的一次遍历。

words.example_sentence: Gradient indicates the direction to minimize loss.
words.code_snippet:
optimizer.zero_grad()
loss.backward()  # compute gradients
optimizer.step()  # update weights
words.example_sentence_cn: 梯度指示最小化损失的方向。

words.example_sentence: A neural network is a model inspired by the brain.
words.example_sentence_cn: 神经网络是受大脑启发的模型。

words.example_sentence: Transformer is the architecture behind modern LLMs.
words.code_snippet:
from transformers import pipeline
classifier = pipeline('sentiment-analysis')
result = classifier('I love this!')
words.example_sentence_cn: Transformer 是现代 LLM 背后的架构。

words.example_sentence: Tokens are the basic units of text processing.
words.code_snippet:
from transformers import AutoTokenizer
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained('bert-base-uncased')
tokens = tokenizer('Hello world')
words.example_sentence_cn: 词元是文本处理的基本单位。

words.example_sentence: Embeddings represent words as dense vectors.
words.code_snippet:
import torch.nn as nn
embedding = nn.Embedding(num_embeddings=10000, embedding_dim=256)
word_vectors = embedding(word_ids)
words.example_sentence_cn: 嵌入将词表示为密集向量。

words.example_sentence: Fine-tuning adapts a pre-trained model to specific tasks.
words.code_snippet:
from transformers import Trainer
trainer = Trainer(
    model=model,
    train_dataset=train_data,
    eval_dataset=val_data
)
trainer.train()
words.example_sentence_cn: 微调将预训练模型适配到特定任务。

words.example_sentence: Inference uses a trained model to make predictions.
words.code_snippet:
model.eval()
with torch.no_grad():
    output = model(input_data)
    prediction = output.argmax(dim=1)
words.example_sentence_cn: 推理使用训练好的模型做出预测。

words.example_sentence: A batch is a group of samples processed together.
words.code_snippet:
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader
dataloader = DataLoader(dataset, batch_size=32, shuffle=True)
for batch in dataloader:
    process(batch)
words.example_sentence_cn: 批次是一起处理的一组样本。
